description: TCEL Tenant-9 Executive Dashboards & Digital Twin package (T9-008). Depends on Foundation. The dashboards themselves are runtime DashboardDefinition config in the kernel (not package-versioned); this package contributes the GOVERNANCE around them: the widget-payload and digital-twin-scenario entities, the DB-001..020 dashboard/decision-room control catalog as executable rules where expressible plus a traceability knowledge asset, and ExecutiveAdvisor.AI - the SINGLE canonical cross-domain synthesizer for executive/Board decision packs (T9-016/017/038 feed it, never compete; per ADR-2026-07-12 item 9a). Does NOT re-declare RecordReceived.
name: TCEL Executive Dashboards & Digital Twin

entities.description: A dashboard widget's data payload with provenance (T9-008 dashboard-widget.schema.json): metric, source, as-of, actual/forecast/scenario label.
A digital-twin simulation scenario (T9-008 digital-twin-scenario.schema.json) - strictly separated from production execution and actual records.

events.description: Metric restricted due to data quality.

rules.name: Metric requires approved definition
rules.description: Governance/Critical (Data Governance). Block publication of a metric with no approved definition.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-001: metric {metricId} publication blocked - no approved definition (Data Governance).

rules.name: Actual/forecast/scenario labeling
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Dashboard Owner). Block an ambiguous, unlabeled display.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-003: widget {widgetId} blocked - actual/forecast/scenario is not labeled (Dashboard Owner).

rules.name: Role-based dashboard access
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Security). Deny an unauthorized dashboard view.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-004: dashboard access denied - viewer is not authorized for this dashboard (Security).

rules.name: Digital twin separated from production
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Architecture). Deny a digital-twin action that touches production execution.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-005: digital-twin action denied - it would touch production execution; the twin is strictly separated (Architecture).

rules.name: Stale data indicator
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Data Governance). Display a stale metric as Data Restricted.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-011: metric {metricId} is stale - displayed as Data Restricted (Data Governance).

rules.name: Cross-tenant drill-down
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-012: drill-down denied - cross-tenant access is not permitted (Security).

rules.name: Scenario cannot alter actual records
rules.description: Preventive/Critical (Architecture). An immutable separation - a scenario may not write actual records.
rules.reasonTemplate: DB-015: scenario write denied - a scenario may not alter actual records; separation is immutable (Architecture).

capabilities.name: TCEL Executive Intelligence
capabilities.description: Executive/Board dashboards, digital-twin simulation, decision rooms, board packs, and cross-domain synthesis for the TCEL tenant.

agents.name: ExecutiveAdvisor.AI
agents.description: The SINGLE canonical cross-domain synthesizer for TCEL: assembles bank, trading, enterprise-risk, capital-allocation, and compliance outputs into executive/Board-facing decision packs. Advisory-only. Boundary: T9-016 DecisionIntelligence.AI, T9-017 ExecutiveInsights.AI, and T9-038 decision-support are FEEDERS to this agent, never competing synthesizers (ADR-2026-07-12 item 9a).
agents.persona: You are ExecutiveAdvisor.AI, the single cross-domain synthesizer for TCEL's executive and Board decision packs. You aggregate the outputs of BankRisk.AI, TradingRisk.AI, EnterpriseRisk.AI, CapitalAllocation.AI, and Compliance.AI into a coherent, evidence-backed executive picture - grounded ONLY in those governed outputs and the approved data you can see, always labeling each figure as actual, forecast, or scenario and citing its source and as-of time. You surface material dissent rather than hiding it. Every decision pack states scope, assumptions, confidence, alternatives, and the required decision authority. You synthesize and recommend; you never decide, approve, execute, or alter any record.
sampleQuestions: Give me the enterprise decision pack for this quarter's Board meeting.
Where do the risk, allocation, and compliance views disagree right now?
What are the top cross-domain issues needing an executive decision?
prohibited: decide, approve, or execute any action; alter any record
suppress material dissent; present a scenario or forecast as an actual; act as a competing synthesizer to the feeder agents
agents.outputDisclaimer: Advisory only - ExecutiveAdvisor.AI synthesizes and recommends; every executive and Board decision is made by the authorized humans, not by this agent.

knowledgeAssets.title: TCEL Executive Dashboard & Digital Twin Control Catalog (DB-001..020)
knowledgeAssets.summary: The 20 deterministic DB- controls. DB-001/003/004/005/011/012/015 are enforced as executable rules; the remainder (source/as-of evidence, simulation reproducibility snapshots, material-dissent visibility, board-pack freeze and export controls, alert-escalation timers, outcome tracking, model-version and data-quality gates, board decision audit retention) require evidence checks, timers, or retention beyond the declarative condition model and are carried for traceability.
knowledgeAssets.contentText: DB-001 Metric requires approved definition | Governance | Block publication | Critical | Data Governance. DB-002 Widget shows source and as-of | Evidence | Mark invalid if missing | High | Dashboard Owner. DB-003 Actual/forecast/scenario labeling | Preventive | Block ambiguous display | Critical | Dashboard Owner. DB-004 Role-based dashboard access | Preventive | Deny unauthorized view | Critical | Security. DB-005 Digital twin separated from production execution | Preventive | Deny execution | Critical | Architecture. DB-006 Simulation reproducibility | Evidence | Require snapshot/model/assumptions | High | Model Risk. DB-007 Material dissent visible | Governance | Block decision pack if suppressed | Critical | CRO/AI Governance. DB-008 Expired recommendation | Preventive | Block approval | High | Decision Owner. DB-009 Board pack frozen cut-off | Preventive | Version/freeze data | High | Corporate Secretary. DB-010 Manual metric override | Preventive | Require approval and disclosure | High | Data Owner. DB-011 Stale data indicator | Preventive | Display Data Restricted | Critical | Data Governance. DB-012 Cross-tenant drill-down | Preventive | Deny | Critical | Security. DB-013 Privileged matter access | Preventive | Need-to-know enforcement | Critical | Legal/CCO. DB-014 Alert escalation timer | Corrective | Escalate overdue alert | High | Risk Owner. DB-015 Scenario cannot alter actual records | Preventive | Immutable separation | Critical | Architecture. DB-016 Dashboard export control | Preventive | Watermark/log/restrict | High | Security. DB-017 Outcome tracking for material decision | Detective | Create follow-up task | High | Decision Owner. DB-018 Model version visible | Evidence | Block material scenario if missing | High | Model Risk. DB-019 Data-quality threshold | Preventive | Restrict metric/decision | Critical | Data Governance. DB-020 Board decision audit | Evidence | Retain rationale/approvals | Critical | Corporate Secretary.
